note: Machine-readable index of the portable set. The prose parent is docs/PORTABLE.md; tools/test/portable-manifest.test.mjs holds the two consistent. Read by show-repo's Portable view.

items.title: web-tools
items.role: loads the working conventions live (surfacing primitives plus the guide-PR course)

items.title: caption
items.role: the surfacing caption, and the guide-PR body sync

items.title: load-skill
items.role: fetch any skill from the library on demand

items.title: show-repo
items.role: browse any repo and move files across repos

items.title: tree
items.role: render a linked file tree of the repo, table-first for mobile

items.title: tasks
items.role: operate the cross-session project tracker

items.title: Working conventions
items.role: the general-behavior hub: prose style, standing decisions, make-work, the session/repository/workstream vocabulary

items.title: Surfacing
items.role: the surfacing system: primitives (chat-handoff mechanics) plus the guide-PR / merge-guide course; loaded with CONVENTIONS.md as one set

items.title: The to-go bag
items.role: catalog of everything here that travels; the prose parent of this manifest

items.title: Project tracker
items.role: opt-in cross-session tracker: one file per task plus a generated board

items.title: Constellation architecture
items.role: the portable kernel of the what-goes-where doctrine: commit discipline, visibility forces repo boundaries, conventions pull from a public hub, the repo owns its own scope. The theory behind show-repo's Map view

items.title: show-repo
items.role: the hosted shell, the stage, and the .web-tools.json manifest

items.title: Artifacts
items.role: the bake-and-publish pipeline and the 📦 marker's place in the link-choice matrix

items.title: Headless vendoring
items.role: build with CDN stacks and test them headless where the sandbox blocks their CDNs

items.title: Markdown in chat
items.role: working visually with markdown in a chat client; tables over nested bullets

items.title: GitHub markdown
items.role: what GitHub's renderer does with Mermaid, math, alerts, sparklines

items.title: MCP server routing
items.role: unexpected approval prompts with two GitHub MCP servers are often routing artifacts

items.title: Web sandbox environment
items.role: dated facts about the Claude Code web sandbox: network, persistence, testing recipes

items.title: Content envelopes
items.role: the envelope family: the surface contract, chat-results, and the schemas that validate them

items.title: Skill library
items.role: the personal skill library load-skill pulls from, published as static resources

items.title: build-board.py
items.role: regenerate a tracker's board.md from task frontmatter; ships inside the plugin

items.title: build-merge-guide.py
items.role: generate docs/MERGE-GUIDE.md from merged PR bodies, non-destructively

items.title: sunset-scan.py
items.role: report SUNSET(date) markers now due for removal

items.title: build-tree.py
items.role: render a repo tree as a linked markdown table for chat
